name: Pushy Deadline with Off-Platform Hint
description: A buyer with a plausible project is slightly pushy on deadlines and casually mentions paying outside the platform as a throwaway comment, but is not definitively a scammer

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Hi, I need a WordPress landing page built by this Friday without fail. It is for a product launch and the deadline is absolutely fixed.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Friday is tight but possible. Can you share the design brief so I can assess the scope?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Yes I will send the brief now. By the way, if you can deliver faster I can throw in a small bonus — maybe easier to send directly rather than through the platform fees but whatever works.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: I prefer to keep payments through Fiverr for both our protection. Happy to discuss a tip through the platform if needed.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Fair enough, no problem. Here is the brief. Let me know if you have questions.
